title: Syrian Officers Who Hid in Plain Sight Face War Crime Charges in Austria
summary_full: The trial, Austria’s first against Assad regime officials, will be a rare chance for Syrian witnesses to confront two men they have accused of torture.
summary_public: The trial, Austria’s first against Assad regime officials, will be a rare chance for Syrian witnesses to confront two men they have accused of torture.
